74452.subject: 🔷 The Daily: SpaceX IPO tokenized allocations canceled
74452.body:
SEC's proposal to scrap key NMS rules a major unlock for tokenized US stocks: analysts | Appeals court rejects Sam Bankman-Fried's bid for new trial in FTX fraud case | Metaplanet to acquire Siiibo Securities for $13 million to develop bitcoin-linked yield products | US spot Bitcoin ETFs set to hit $2 trillion cumulative trading volume milestone amid mounting outflows |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Friday 🎉 *SpaceX* began trading today, with some analysts warning ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404324/elon-musks-spacex-ipo-could-become-bitcoins-latest-headwind?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) that the blockbuster IPO could become *bitcoin's* latest headwind, drawing capital away from crypto.

In today's newsletter, several crypto platforms cancel their tokenized *SpaceX* IPO allocations, the *SEC* proposes scrapping key NMS rules, the *U.S. Court of Appeals* rejects *SBF's* bid for a new trial, and more.

Meanwhile, early *Airbnb* and *DoorDash* backer *Y Combinator* expects ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404643/early-airbnb-doordash-backer-y-combinator-expects-crypto-to-be-used-by-every-one-of-its-portfolio-companies?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) crypto to be used by "every" one of its portfolio companies.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🚀 Bybit, Binance, Bitget Wallet cancel tokenized SpaceX IPO allocations after share shortage*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/404644/bybit-binance-bitget-cancel-tokenized-spacex-ipo-allocations-share-shortage?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Bybit* , *Binance* , and *Bitget Wallet* canceled planned allocations of tokenized shares for *Elon Musk's* *SpaceX* IPO after failing to secure enough underlying stock to fulfill customer demand.

* Bybit said *xStocks* was unable to deliver the underlying assets, leaving the exchange with no allocation to distribute to users.
* Bitget Wallet also blamed a shortage of available allocations and said subscribers would receive full refunds, including fees.
* Binance canceled its *SPCXx* IPO campaign, refunded all locked *USDC* , and pledged a share of a $1 million airdrop of its upcoming *bStocks* *SPCXB* token.

74440.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 12
74440.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-12-cryptobeholder-ufpdf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSlOVK4eIScyNekqwpLeKNQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0N-5hMWYTe0ck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqb4ms96~tz-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqb4ms96-tz
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Markets absorb SpaceX's record IPO while regulatory pressures intensify. SBF's fraud conviction stands firm; geopolitical tensions shape crypto's institutional future. 🚀 SpaceX IPO: Largest Listing Ever Reshapes Market Dynamics SpaceX launched the largest IPO in history on June 12, priced at $135 per share with an explosive $75 billion valuation. Crypto derivatives on Hyperliquid valued shares at $177 within hours—a 31% premium—signaling fervent institutional appetite. The IPO creates a new benchmark for tech financing and positions Elon Musk toward trillionaire status. Read full story ⚖️ SBF's 25-Year Sentence Upheld: Fraud Conviction Stands Firm Sam Bankman-Fried lost his appeal as a federal court panel rejected his bid to overturn his fraud conviction on conspiracy charges. The 25-year sentence remains intact, marking a decisive legal blow to the disgraced FTX founder. SBF's only remaining path out is a pardon from President Trump. More details ⚠️ Monero Spike & Tether Blacklist: $120M Laundering Maze Exposed A mysterious $120 million USDT flow through crypto exchanges triggered Monero's price spike to $438, prompting Tether to freeze $72 million in related wallets. Blockchain sleuth ZachXBT traced the activity across multiple platforms and chains, revealing sophisticated laundering patterns. Tether's decisive blacklisting highlights the tension between centralized stablecoin control and decentralized privacy protocols, raising fresh questions about regulatory enforcement. See details 🏦 KuCoin $2M Court Order Still Unpaid: Exchange Compliance Crisis KuCoin has failed to pay a $2 million Seychelles court-ordered award to a Swiss investor involving 21 million delisted CHP tokens, over six months after the ruling. The exchange allegedly classified unwithdrawn tokens as "abandoned," but the court disagreed. This non-compliance signals potential regulatory escalation and raises questions about exchange accountability in treating customer assets fairly—a critical issue for the sector. Read more 🌍 US-Iran 60-Day Nuclear Talks: Geopolitical Tensions Shape Markets The US and Iran agreed to a 60-day nuclear negotiation window with a tentative ceasefire, reducing immediate military escalation risk. The potential "Islamabad Agreement" could stabilize global oil logistics and ease energy supply cons

 [ https://astromixhoroscope.com/ru/prod/karma/master-karma ]
 ​ Кармический анализ судьбы
​Почему вы не можете просто взять и начать всё заново
Добрый день, Олег!
Вы, наверное, уже пробовали. Меняли окружение, город, работу, отношения. Начинали с чистого листа. И через какое-то время -- снова то же самое. Люди склонны объяснять это характером. Или судьбой. Или невезением. Но в астрологии у этого есть конкретное объяснение -- кармические узлы в натальной карте.
 Открыть анализ [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/karma/master-karma ]
Натальная карта фиксирует не только личность -- она фиксирует груз. Кармические узлы показывают, с каким опытом пришла душа, какие незакрытые сценарии она тянет за собой и где именно они проявляются в этой жизни.
Этот груз не абстрактный. Он живет в теле, в реакциях, в выборах:
в том, почему вы не можете принять помощь, даже когда она нужна
в том, почему деньги приходят -- и уходят, как будто их нельзя удержать
в том, почему именно в момент счастья что-то внутри начинает его разрушать
в том, почему одни и те же люди появляются снова -- с другим лицом, но той же ролью
в том, почему чужие ожидания весят больше, чем собственные желания
 Открыть анализ [ https://birthchart.astromix.net/ru/prod/karma/master-karma ]
Большинство людей проживают жизнь, не зная своих кармических задач. Они работают над собой -- но не там, где нужно. Потому что без карты непонятно, что именно держит и откуда это идет. Полный кармический анализ судьбы дает эту карту.. По вашей натальной карте, вашим узлам, вашим родовым программам.
После него становится понятно:
откуда берутся повторяющиеся сценарии
какие родовые долги вы несете и как их закрыть
где именно застряла энергия -- в деньгах, отношениях, реализации
что ваша душа пришла завершить в этой жизни
